notes: Derived from the expert single station report and used as the gold-standard cycle interpretation for this workstation.
This configuration should override weaker heuristic cycle definitions when training or evaluating the single-station queue.

segments.label: align
segments.content: Move and hold fabric to make two edges align with both hand.

segments.label: put
segments.content: Put fabric on bed and set inside feed dog for sewing.

segments.label: sew
segments.content: Push fabric forward under needle and continue sewing flow.

segments.label: align
segments.content: Operator re-aligns fabric edges with both hand.

segments.label: put
segments.content: Put fabric on bed for sewing with both hand.

segments.label: sew
segments.content: Push fabric under needle and complete the sewing motion.

segments.label: pass
segments.content: Disengage fabric from bed and dispatch it onto the stack.

segments.label: get
segments.content: Move from dispatch zone to get zone, retrieve fabric and shoulder tape.

segments.label: adjust_machine
segments.content: Attach shoulder tape with machine and hold tape in feed dog.

segments.label: put
segments.content: Slight push of fabric by left hand while right hand resets.

segments.label: get
segments.content: Reach fabric with both hands and pull it toward operator body.

segments.label: align
segments.content: Move and hold fabric to make two edges align with both hand.

segments.label: put
segments.content: Put fabric on bed and set it into feed dog for sewing.

segments.label: sew
segments.content: Push fabric forward under needle and continue sewing.

segments.label: align
segments.content: Operator re-aligns fabric edges with both hand.

segments.label: put
segments.content: Put fabric on bed for sewing with both hand.

segments.label: sew
segments.content: Push fabric under needle for sewing.

segments.label: get
segments.content: Left hand releases fabric and moves to get zone.

segments.label: pass
segments.content: Move fabric from get zone to dispatch zone by left hand.

segments.label: get
segments.content: Move from dispatch zone to get zone and pull fabric toward operator body.

segments.label: align
segments.content: Move and hold fabric to make two edges align with both hand.
